motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def baseNeg2(self, n: int) -> str:
        if n == 0:
            return '0'
        result = ''
        while n:
            n, remainder = divmod(n, -2)
            result = str(remainder) + result
            if remainder == -1:
                n += 1
        return result
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(log(n))
energy implications: LOW
